name: encode_standalone_ack_one_packet
precondition: Engine receives one complete single-fragment message (flags 0x05 Begin|End, seq 0x01, payload 0xff) via HandleCharacteristicReceived before EncodeStandAloneAck is called (TestBtpEngine.cpp:311-327); HasUnackedData() is true.

name: encode_standalone_ack_no_unacked_data
precondition: Engine is freshly initialized (SetUp: Init(nullptr, false)); no data has been received; EncodeStandAloneAck is called immediately with no prior HandleCharacteristicReceived call.

name: encode_standalone_ack_multi_fragment_message
precondition: Engine receives a complete 3-fragment message (seq 0x01 Begin, seq 0x02 Continue, seq 0x03 End; payload fd/fe/ff) via three HandleCharacteristicReceived calls (TestBtpEngine.cpp:395-414) before EncodeStandAloneAck is called.
